name: Rhubarb, Rose & Strawberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the rhubarb and layer it in a large bowl with the whole hulled strawberries and sugar.
2. Pour on lemon juice, cover and leave overnight.
3. Tip contents of the bowl into a preserving pan. Add lemon pips tied in muslin bag.
4. Bring gently to boil. Boil for 2 minutes then tip back into bowl. Cover and leave overnight once more.
5. Put rhubarb and strawberry mixture back into pan. Remove white tips from rose petals. Add petals, pushing down among fruit.
6. Bring to boiling point and fast boil until setting point is reached. Pot in warm sterilized jars.
Makes enough for 6-7 jars.
